name: Byggmax Group AB (publ)
summary: Byggmax Group AB (publ) sells building materials and related products for DIY projects in Sweden, Norway, and Finland. The company offers timber, sheet materials, garden products, tools, paint, and other building materials. As of December 31, 2020, it operates 180 stores, including 116 stores in Sweden, 43 stores in Norway, and 10 stores in Finland, as well as 11 showrooms with Sk√É¬•nska Byggvaror's concept. The company also offers its products online. Byggmax Group AB (publ) was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Solna, Sweden.
